and eligibility groups authorized to enroll in each plan. 

Each APL TAF is comprised of five files —a base file and four supplemental files: 1) location, 2) operating authority, 3) 
population enrolled, and 4) service area. All five files can be linked together using unique keys that are constructed 
based on various data elements. 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the TAF APL
